milestone: 2026-04-18 — PP recovery term landed (replaces orchestrator post-limiter steering multiplier); hairpin_15 re-registered 79.0→98.7
notes: Post-fix hairpin golden after PP recovery term (continuous smoothstep, upstream of rate/jerk limiter) replaced orchestrator post-limiter 1.2×/1.5× steering multiplier. hairpin_15: 79.0 live → 98.7 (Control 80→100, jerk max 30.08→18.0). Regression sweep (4 tracks) all within tolerance of frozen 2026-04-17 baselines — no other goldens updated. sweeping_highway NOT updated — no fresh run this cycle.

s_loop.notes: Post q_lat=1.0 revert. Trajectory 96.7 green, all other layers 100. Slight curve_local_phase latching on straights (15.2%), not score-impacting.

highway_65.notes: Post q_lat=1.0 revert. Trajectory 98.1 green. Regression 96.2→59.0→99.5 (Δ +3.3 vs previous baseline).

hairpin_15.notes: 2026-04-18: PP recovery term landed (continuous smoothstep 1.0-2.0m, upstream of rate/jerk limiter). Replaces orchestrator post-limiter 1.2×/1.5× steering multiplier. Control layer 80→100 (jerk max 30.08→18.0 — now bound by pp_max_steering_jerk=18, previously bypassed by post-limiter multiplier). §27 recovery-term telemetry: active 18.4% frames, 100% at-car source, P95 term 0.053 rad, 0 saturation events. Trajectory 95.1 — residual apex cutting on C1 (late_turn_in, meanErr=-0.299m) predates this fix.

sweeping_highway.notes: 55% arc coverage (R300 corners). MPC active ~75-77%. NOT re-baselined 2026-04-17 — no fresh E2E run this cycle.

mixed_radius.notes: Post q_lat=1.0 revert. Trajectory 95.2 green, all other layers 100. PP/MPC hybrid track (R40-R200).

hill_highway.notes: First registration. Post q_lat=1.0 revert recovered from 59.0→97.6. Trajectory 91.5 — residual apex cutting on R100 curves (C2/C3/C4), predates the q_lat regression, flagged for separate iteration. No e-stops or OOL.
